task: Get the frozen vegetarian cheese pizza between 5 to 10 USD on Target.
graderReasoning: The agent searched Target for frozen vegetarian cheese pizza, applied the $5–$9.99 price filter, and selected a qualifying item: Banza Chickpea Gluten Free Protein Cheese Frozen Pizza - 10.9oz at $9.79. The final evidence shows a 'Choose options' dialog for that exact product with fulfillment details and a button labeled '1 in cart,' confirming it was added successfully. This satisfies the task of getting a frozen vegetarian cheese pizza between $5 and $10 on Target.

action_history: Opening Target: const tgt1 = await openTab('https://www.target.com/');
Searching Target for pizza: await page.locator('e17').fill('frozen vegetarian cheese pizza');
Searching Target for pizza: await page.locator('e19').click();

Adding selected cheese pizza: await page.locator('e962').click();
